enigmas.title: The Empire of Dreams
enigmas.riddle: The Dark Side led you here, but your quest is just beginning. The one who gave me life also created a kingdom where a mouse wears white gloves. The faces of those who share his empire hide below, where a silent surface reflects your own gaze.
enigmas.hint: Where gravity draws the gaze, the surface reflects your own quest.

enigmas.title: From the Enchanted Kingdom to the Blades of the Orient
enigmas.riddle: These joyful faces were born in a studio of dreams, but your next clue hides where demons are hunted to an Eastern melody. Below, to my left, the humblest of dark caskets watches in the shadows, waiting for you.
enigmas.hint: The humblest casket sleeps in the shadows, on the side where the sun never comes.

enigmas.title: From Demons to Titans
enigmas.riddle: The demons fall one by one under your blade, but what will you do against giants? Titans threaten humanity behind walls as high as the sky. At the very top, on the left, the sun dies on the silhouette of a blade, that's where the next secret sleeps.
enigmas.hint: Rise to the zenith. Where the light dies, a blade watches in silence.

enigmas.title: The Ocean Behind the Walls
enigmas.riddle: Beyond the walls, the scouts discovered the ocean. What if you crossed this sea? There is an island in the Mediterranean, between Italy and Africa, where the water is turquoise and the cliffs are dizzying. Right beside me, someone cuts through clear waters in silence, the rest of your journey rests in their hands.
enigmas.hint: My blood neighbor shows you the way, the one whose arms cut through limpid water.

enigmas.title: From an Island to a Miracle
enigmas.riddle: This island is a miracle of nature, but another miracle awaits you. A Colombian family lives in a magical house where each member has a gift… except one. Below, to the right of the one who never lies, the smallest golden casket keeps her story.
enigmas.hint: The most discreet gold hides to the right of the one who never lies.

enigmas.title: The Gift of Cooking
enigmas.riddle: Mirabel proved that you don't need magic to be extraordinary. Another unlikely hero understood this too: a tiny chef who hides under a toque in Paris. 'Anyone can cook!' Below, where knowledge rests in rows, a dark frame pays homage in the shadows.
enigmas.hint: Go down where knowledge rests in rows. The shadows keep an edible secret.

enigmas.title: From the Rat Under the Toque to the Rat Under the Cape
enigmas.riddle: This Parisian rat has a famous cousin. His name is Scabbers… well, that's what everyone thought. In truth, he's a wizard who betrayed his friends. Within arm's reach, right next to me, the world of the one who survived a lightning bolt whispers the rest.
enigmas.hint: Reach out without moving, your next oracle breathes within arm's reach.

enigmas.title: When the Wizards Left Earth
enigmas.riddle: The wizards left Earth long before the Muggles made it uninhabitable. When humans left too, only a lonely little robot remained, compacting waste, waiting for a love from the stars. Below, on the left, a golden casket offers him refuge, he still waits there.
enigmas.hint: Gold flows to the nadir, on the side where dawn rises. Seek the one who waits.

enigmas.title: From the Love of Stars to that of Cherry Blossoms
enigmas.riddle: Wall-E crossed the universe for Eve. But the most touching love is sometimes the most discreet. Two people hide their true faces from each other: she, behind her coldness; he, behind his tattoos. At the very top, on the right, eternal petals sleep in a golden casket, your treasure rests among the cherry blossoms.
enigmas.hint: At the summit, where twilight never comes, eternal petals sleep in gold.

enigmas.title: The Masks Fall, the Mystery Remains
enigmas.riddle:
Like Hori and Miyamura, you saw beyond appearances. But the mystery is not yet solved…

Two souls that everything opposes found each other in the silence of space. One compacts, the other flies. Together, they reignited the Earth.

Return to them. Three knocks, like at the door of a forgotten world. Knock… knock… knock… and the veil tears.
enigmas.hint: The number between silence and noise, knock, and the veil tears.
